features.featureTitle: Add a React Query hook `useOpenOrders()` to `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` that calls the backend `getOpenOrders()` function and polls every 10 seconds, following the same pattern as existing hooks in that file.

Create a new `OpenOrdersPanel` React component in `frontend/src/components/OpenOrdersPanel.tsx` that displays the open orders fetched from ICDex in a table with columns: Order ID, Side (BUY/SELL with neon green / red accent badges consistent with the terminal theme), Price, and Quantity. Show a loading skeleton while fetching, an error message on failure, and an empty state message when there are no open orders. Add this panel to the dashboard grid in `frontend/src/App.tsx`.
